bead.title: power-catalog-thresholds: compute MinPower thresholds from available models
bead.description:
<context-digest>The agent exposes available models and their power values. DDx may use that catalog to choose abstract MinPower thresholds, including thresholds that restrict routing to top-power models, but must not select concrete models/providers.</context-digest>
Add DDx retry-policy helpers for model/power catalog threshold consumption. Status rendering belongs in ddx-6036e1bc; this bead returns abstract power thresholds only.
bead.acceptance:
1. A helper computes a MinPower threshold for top-model-only retries from catalog data.
2. Helper returns only a power number, never model/provider/harness pins.
3. Helper has no dependency on status/UI rendering code.
4. Tests cover empty catalog, duplicate powers, top-N threshold, threshold stability when catalog order changes, and no provider/model-name branching.
5. ExecuteRequest routing fields are not altered by catalog threshold code.
